Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 227 

D3 = Medical Genetics and Genomics 
D4 = Undersea and Hyperbaric Medicine 
D5 = Opioid Treatment Program 
D6 = Home Infusion Therapy Services 
D7 = Micrographic Dermatologic Surgery 
D8 = Adult Congenital Heart Disease 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank starting with the 2023 Release 1 RIF.
